title: Air-Fried Chestnut Mushroom Tagine
description: A buttery and crisp vegetarian-friendly Tunisian dish featuring chestnuts and mushrooms, perfect for meal prep.
instructions: Chop chestnuts and mushrooms into small pieces.
Finely chop onion, garlic, and herbs. Season with salt and pepper.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat, add onions, sauté until translucent. Add minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Stir in the chopped chestnuts and mushrooms, season with thyme and bay leaves. Cook for 5 minutes.
Transfer to an air fryer basket coated with bread crumbs. Drizzle with butter and bake at 200°C (392°F) for about 10-15 minutes until crispy on the outside.
Serve hot as a side dish or as part of a meal prep.
